name: mojo-adr009-test-split
description: Split Mojo test files that exceed ADR-009 limit of 10 fn test_ functions per file to prevent heap corruption in Mojo v0.26.1. Use when: (1) a test file has more than 10 fn test_ functions, (2) CI shows intermittent heap corruption crashes (libKGENCompilerRTShared.so JIT fault), (3) splitting an existing test file per ADR-009 workaround.
